title: Variant annotation (Ensembl VEP REST)
description: ClawBio's 'Variant Annotation' skill (Annotate VCF variants with Ensembl VEP REST, ClinVar significance, gnomAD frequencies — https://github.com/ClawBio/ClawBio) expressed as DATA. It declares the Ensembl VEP REST endpoint as an http.get resource; VEP's colocated_variants carry gnomAD allele frequencies and ClinVar clinical significance, so one annotated table answers 'rare, high-impact, pathogenic' with ordinary SQL the agent writes. There is NO VEP/ClinVar/gnomAD-specific TypeScript — the URL and response shape live in the manifest, the same generic http.get resolver serves any JSON/CSV endpoint, and the resolver memoizes by ETag so re-annotating the same variants does not re-download. Network is the host's opt-in by composition: this manifest fails closed until a host injects a fetch (load the explicit index-networked.ts entrypoint).

resolvers.title: HTTP GET
resolvers.description: GET a declared URL and materialize the JSON/CSV response into a table.
